Group.Option: A copy of the Conditional Certification from the state or local agency
A copy of the employee's Drivers License
A copy of the employee's Work Permit
A copy of the employee's Utility Bill
A copy of the employee's W-4
A copy of the employee's Apartment Lease
A copy of the employee's school or library card
A copy of the employee's Voters Registration Card
A copy of the employee's Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) Award Letter
A copy of the employee's Selective Service Registration Card
A copy of the employee's Social Security Administration Acceptance Letter
A copy of the veteran's DD-214
A copy of the veteran's Discharge Papers
The veteran's Reserve Unit Contacts
A copy of the veteran's FL 21-802
A copy of the veteran's Unemployment Claims Record
A copy of the veteran's Unemployment Benefits History
A copy of the veteran's DD-214
A copy of the veteran's Discharge Papers
The veteran's Reserve Unit Contacts
A copy of the veteran's FL 21-802

If the employee is a minor, please send a signed letter from their parent or guardian indicating that they have not been attending a secondary, technical, or post-secondary school during the past 6 months
A copy of the employee's Drivers License
A copy of the employee's Work Permit
A copy of the employee's school or library card
A copy of the employee's Voters Registration Card
A copy of the employee's Birth Certificate
A copy of the employee's Unemployment Claims Record
A copy of the employee's Unemployment Benefits History
A copy of the employee's Drivers License
The employee's Parole Officer's Name & Phone number
A copy of the employee's Correctional Institution Records
A copy of the employee's Court Record
A copy of the veteran's DD-214
A copy of the veteran's Discharge Papers
The veteran's Reserve Unit Contacts
A copy of the recipient's SNAP benefit history
A signed statement from an authorized individual detailing the specific months benefits were received
Provide the SNAP benefits Case ID Number
A copy of Social Security Insurance Authorization
A copy of Evidence of Social Security Insurance Benefit
A copy of the employee's Birth Certificate
A copy of the employee's Drivers License
A copy of the employee's Work Permit
A copy of the employee's School ID Card
A copy of the employee's Government Issued ID
A copy of the veteran's DD-214
A copy of the veteran's Discharge Papers
The veteran's Reserve Unit Contacts
A copy of the veteran's Unemployment Claims Record
A copy of the veteran's Unemployment Benefits History
The vocational rehabilitation agency contact name and phone number
A copy of the letter from the rehabilitation caseworker
A copy of the Individual Plan of Employment (IPE)
A signed statement from an authorized individual detailing the specific months benefits were received
